name: Donkey Kong Country 3
description: Donkey Kong Country 3 is an action platforming game.

options.label: Progression Balancing
options.description: A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

options.label: Accessibility
options.description: Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

options.label: Goal
options.description: Determines the goal of the seed Knautilus: Scuttle the Knautilus in Krematoa and defeat Baron K.

options.label: Krematoa Bonus Coin Cost
options.description: How many Bonus Coins are needed to unlock each level in Krematoa

options.label: Percentage Of Extra Bonus Coins
options.description: What Percentage of unneeded Bonus Coins are included in the item pool

options.label: Number Of Banana Birds
options.description: How many Banana Birds are put into the item pool

options.label: Percentage Of Banana Birds
options.description: What Percentage of Banana Birds in the item pool are required for Banana Bird Hunt

options.label: Dk Coins For Gyrocopter
options.description: How many DK Coins are needed to unlock the Gyrocopter Note: Achieving this number before unlocking the Turbo Ski will cause the game to grant you a one-time upgrade to the next non-unlocked boat, until you return to Funky.

options.label: Kongsanity
options.description: Whether collecting all four KONG letters in each level grants a check

options.label: Difficulty
options.description: Which Difficulty Level to use NORML: The Normal Difficulty HARDR: Many DK Barrels are removed TUFST: Most DK Barrels and all Midway Barrels are removed

options.label: Autosave
options.description: Whether the game should autosave after each level

options.label: Merry
options.description: Whether the Bonus Barrels will be Christmas-themed

options.label: Kong Palette Swap
options.description: Which Palette to use for the Kongs

options.label: Starting Life Count
options.description: How many extra lives to start the game with
